tools.description: C/Java library and command-line digital forensics toolkit for analyzing volume and file system data.
Graphical digital forensics platform built on The Sleuth Kit for end-to-end case investigation.
Python 3 framework for extracting digital artifacts from volatile memory (RAM) samples.
Python engine for creating super-timelines from hundreds of log files and forensic artifacts.
High-performance C++ forensic tool that extracts emails, credit-card numbers, URLs and other artifacts from disk images.
C source for TestDisk and PhotoRec, signature-based partition and file recovery utilities.
Perl platform-independent library and CLI for reading, writing and editing EXIF/IPTC/XMP metadata in images and other files.
Rust-based firmware analysis tool for identifying and extracting embedded files and executable code.
Go-based endpoint visibility, monitoring and DFIR collection tool driven by the VQL query language.
Python obfuscated-string solver that automatically extracts stack/tight/decoded strings from malware samples.
C# .NET parser plus EvtxECmd CLI for Windows XML Event Log (.evtx) files used in DFIR.
C# full-featured offline Windows Registry parser with cell-level forensics and deleted-key recovery.
C# command-line parser for NTFS Master File Table ($MFT) and related artifacts.
C# better-strings utility for forensic investigations, with regex patterns and carved-data extraction.
Perl Windows-Registry extraction tool with GUI, CLI and plugin framework for hive analysis.
Fast Rust-based pure-Python parser for Windows XML Event Log (EVTX) files.
Curated YARA and IOC signature database used by LOKI and THOR Lite scanners for threat hunting and DFIR.
Community-maintained repository of YARA rules covering malware, webshells, exploit kits and CVEs.
C suite of tools for collecting, processing and analyzing NetFlow/IPFIX/sFlow traffic for network forensics.
C/C++ wireless network detector, sniffer and IDS for Wi-Fi, Bluetooth and SDR capture.
Python interactive packet manipulation program for forging, decoding, capturing and analyzing network traffic.
C library plus hivexsh/hivexml tools for safely reading and writing Windows Registry hive files.
C library and CLI tools (evtinfo, evtexport) for reading legacy Windows Event Log (EVT) files.
Actively-maintained C fork of the Foremost file carver with VirusTotal lookup and modernized build.
